sessionStart.prompt: You are working in the AIDocxWorkFlow project. All 13 SKILL.md (12 stage skills under .cursor/skills/ + 1 aidocx-feedback-logger) are loaded automatically. The aidocx-feedback-logger hook (.cursor/hooks/aidocx_feedback_logger_hook.py) is also registered on beforeSubmitPrompt and sessionEnd — it auto-records stage_started / stage_finished / session_summary events to workflow_assets/feedback_logs/session_*.jsonl. When the user expresses dissatisfaction (e.g. 'this stage is wrong', 'the test cases miss X', 'rerun S6'), proactively invoke the aidocx-feedback-logger skill to write a structured feedback event alongside the auto-recorded ones.
